name: Artichoke and Oyster Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. See recipes for Oyster Souffle Base and Oyster Sauce.
2. Trim the artichokes and rub the cut ends with lemon to prevent oxidation, which can turn the ends brown.
3. Drop the artichokes into boiling salted water and cook for 30 minutes or until the bottoms are just tender and a leaf pulls out with slight resistance.
4. Remove the choke from the water, re-form the cooked artichoke, and stuff it with the souffle base.
5. Preheat your oven to 375°F.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until the souffle is puffed and brown.
7. Serve topped with oyster sauce.
